name: RPlog_The_General
title: The General
summary: In a black meditation chamber aboard his destroyer, Darth Malign, also known as Tyler, summons the mercenary Axel Vichten and the disgraced officer Dareus to formally induct them into his Sith brotherhood of darkness in service to his master Vadim. Over ritual wine, both men pledge their allegiance and don the order's plain black uniforms, becoming Malign's agents of chaos. Malign reveals he is haunted by an ancestral spirit driving him to walk dead worlds in search of ancient Sith artifacts and knowledge, beginning with the devastated planet Cochran, while his agents sow confusion across the galaxy. The conspirators discuss how Skywalker learned of a planned attack, agreeing to use misdirection, and plot to ignite war between the Caspian Union and the Corporate Sector Authority and seize control of Outer Rim crime through Nar Shaddaa. Malign assures Dareus that the Twi'lek Tyy'sun Eson cannot pierce his mind, and grants Dareus command of the flagship Predator's bridge before departing to await the coming assault on the Hutt fleet.
